findings.title: SolarWinds Serv-U Critical RCE — Root Access via Broken Access Control
findings.summary: Broken access control in Serv-U allows admin user creation and root code execution; 12,000+ exposed instances on Shodan, historically targeted by Clop and Chinese APTs.

findings.title: Microsoft Semantic Kernel RCE — Python Code Injection via Vector Store Filters
findings.summary: Untrusted filter expressions in Semantic Kernel InMemoryVectorStore allow Python sandbox escape to arbitrary code execution; public PoC available.

findings.title: OpenCode Unauthenticated RCE — Full Exploitation Toolkit Published
findings.summary: Unauthenticated RCE with published exploitation toolkit including session creation, command exec, file ops, and interactive shell on default port 4096.

findings.title: Caddy FastCGI Path Confusion — Unicode Normalization to RCE
findings.summary: Unicode normalization bug in Caddy FastCGI path splitting allows executing uploaded non-PHP files as PHP; fixed in 2.11.1.

findings.title: Wormable XMRig Campaign — BYOVD + Logic Bomb + Air-Gap Spreading
findings.summary: Sophisticated cryptojacking with BYOVD defense evasion, time-based logic bombs, and worm capabilities via external storage for air-gapped lateral movement.

findings.title: CISA BOD 26-02 — Edge Device Replacement Mandates
findings.summary: CISA mandates federal agencies replace end-of-life edge devices by specific deadlines; signals shift from patching to hardware replacement.

noted.summary: Binding directive for federal edge device replacement; sets direction for private sector.
Germany proposes banning China and Russia-linked network equipment vendors from 5G infrastructure.
Improper access control allowing unauthenticated network-based attacks; patched, no user action needed.
ElizaOS contributor bribes documented; trust issues in open-source AI agent infrastructure.
SpyLend loan apps on Google Play used for India-targeted extortion, harassment, deepfake blackmail.
Dragos 2025 report: 119 groups targeting OT, 3,300 orgs hit, 49% increase year-over-year.
